character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Involved in a bargain with Silver, as per the doctor's warning to Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate with multiple weapons, leading the group with a rope tethered to the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Flint
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate perched on Silver's shoulder, described as gabbling purposeless talk.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in the context of a warning to Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who shrugs his shoulders and delays decision-making.

character_dossiers.name: old Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who comments on the skeleton's unnatural position.

character_dossiers.name: George Merry
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who examines the skeleton and identifies it as a seaman.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who mentions Allardyce's debt.

character_dossiers.name: Allardyce
character_dossiers.biography: A seaman identified by the skeleton's clothing and bones.

character_dossiers.name: the sea-cook
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who leads the group and carries the rope tethering the narrator.
